title: lanonia calciphila
intro: Lanonia calciphila, also known as the Queensland Staff Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Australia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lanonia calciphila include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and provide relief from respiratory issues. Lanonia calciphila is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, and the bark, leaves, and roots of the plant are often employed in traditional medicine.
